actions.intent: Start with the upper-left support pair, keeping the route focused without committing to broad side farming.
Open the lower puppy's final side and extract the urgent lower target early.
Pivot upward through the center-right blockers and start the upper rescue route.
Bring the upper puppy to one-clear-away through the center-left route.
Use the revealed ice value to clear the left approach without overfilling the dock.
Open the final upper side and complete the lower-first central route solve.

notes: Designer-approved intended path after second telemetry tuning: lower puppy extracts early, then the solve pivots through the center-left upper route without broad side farming.
